lines.text: Ah.
lines.singableText: Ah.

lines.text: Sea travelers speak of Yingzhou.
lines.singableText: Sea travelers speak of Yingzhou.

lines.text: Mist and waves are dim, truly hard to seek.
lines.singableText: Mist and waves are dim, truly hard to seek.

lines.text: Clouds and rosy light flicker, perhaps visible.
lines.singableText: Clouds and rosy light flicker, perhaps visible.

lines.text: Tianmu joins the sky and stretches across heaven.
lines.singableText: Tianmu joins the sky and stretches across heaven.

lines.text: Tiantai rises forty-eight thousand zhang.
lines.singableText: Tiantai rises forty-eight thousand zhang.

lines.text: Before it, one would lean and fall southeast.
lines.singableText: Before it, one would lean and fall southeast.

lines.text: The lake moon shines on my shadow.
lines.singableText: The lake moon shines on my shadow.

lines.text: It sends me to Shanxi stream.
lines.singableText: It sends me to Shanxi stream.

lines.text: Where Lord Xie once stayed.
lines.singableText: Where Lord Xie once stayed.

lines.text: Green waters ripple; clear gibbons cry.
lines.singableText: Green waters ripple; clear gibbons cry.

lines.text: My feet wear Xie Gong's clogs.
lines.singableText: My feet wear Xie Gong's clogs.

lines.text: My body climbs the ladder of blue clouds.
lines.singableText: My body climbs the ladder of blue clouds.

lines.text: Lost among flowers and leaning on stone, dusk suddenly falls.
lines.singableText: Lost among flowers and leaning on stone, dusk suddenly falls.

lines.text: On the cliffside I see the sea sun; in the air I hear the heavenly rooster.
lines.singableText: On the cliffside I see the sea sun; in the air I hear the heavenly rooster.

lines.text: A thousand cliffs twist; the road is uncertain; among flowers and stone, dusk arrives.
lines.singableText: A thousand cliffs twist; the road is uncertain; among flowers and stone, dusk arrives.

lines.text: Bears roar, dragons chant, the rock springs rumble; deep woods tremble, peaks are startled.
lines.singableText: Bears roar, dragons chant, the rock springs rumble; deep woods tremble, peaks are startled.

lines.text: The waters shimmer and give birth to mist.
lines.singableText: The waters shimmer and give birth to mist.

lines.text: Lightning splits and thunder crashes.
lines.singableText: Lightning splits and thunder crashes.

lines.text: Hills and ridges collapse and break.
lines.singableText: Hills and ridges collapse and break.

lines.text: The stone doors of the cave heaven.
lines.singableText: The stone doors of the cave heaven.

lines.text: Open in a thunderous crash.
lines.singableText: Open in a thunderous crash.

lines.text: The blue vastness has no bottom; sun and moon shine on gold and silver towers.
lines.singableText: The blue vastness has no bottom; sun and moon shine on gold and silver towers.

lines.text: Rainbow is their robe, wind is their horse.
lines.singableText: Rainbow is their robe, wind is their horse.

lines.text: Lords of the clouds descend in profusion.
lines.singableText: Lords of the clouds descend in profusion.

lines.text: Tigers beat the zithers.
lines.singableText: Tigers beat the zithers.

lines.text: Phoenixes wheel the carriages; immortals stand thick as hemp.
lines.singableText: Phoenixes wheel the carriages; immortals stand thick as hemp.

lines.text: Suddenly my soul trembles; startled awake, I sigh long.
lines.singableText: Suddenly my soul trembles; startled awake, I sigh long.

lines.text: I find only the pillow and mat when awake.
lines.singableText: I find only the pillow and mat when awake.

lines.text: The pleasures of the world are like this.
lines.singableText: The pleasures of the world are like this.

lines.text: Since ancient times, all things flow east like water.
lines.singableText: Since ancient times, all things flow east like water.

lines.text: Lightning and thunder; hills and ridges collapse.
lines.singableText: Lightning and thunder; hills and ridges collapse.

lines.text: The stone doors of cave heaven open with a crash.
lines.singableText: The stone doors of cave heaven open with a crash.

lines.text: Lords of the clouds descend in profusion.
lines.singableText: Lords of the clouds descend in profusion.

lines.text: Tigers beat the zithers; phoenixes wheel the carriages.
lines.singableText: Tigers beat the zithers; phoenixes wheel the carriages.

lines.text: Immortals stand in rows like hemp.
lines.singableText: Immortals stand in rows like hemp.

lines.text: My soul trembles; startled awake, I sigh long.
lines.singableText: My soul trembles; startled awake, I sigh long.

lines.text: I find only the pillow and mat when awake.
lines.singableText: I find only the pillow and mat when awake.

lines.text: The mists and cloudlight just seen are lost.
lines.singableText: The mists and cloudlight just seen are lost.

lines.text: The pleasures of the world are like this.
lines.singableText: The pleasures of the world are like this.

lines.text: Since ancient times, all things flow east like water.
lines.singableText: Since ancient times, all things flow east like water.

lines.text: I leave you; when shall I return?
lines.singableText: I leave you; when shall I return?

lines.text: When I must go, I ride to visit famous mountains.
lines.singableText: When I must go, I ride to visit famous mountains.

lines.text: How could I bow my brows and bend my waist to serve the powerful?
lines.singableText: How could I bow my brows and bend my waist to serve the powerful?

lines.text: And lose my free and happy face?
lines.singableText: And lose my free and happy face?

lines.text: And lose my free and happy face?
lines.singableText: And lose my free and happy face?

provenance.correction: Original-poem ACE route selected from seven candidates. Public audio is the trimmed seed 733105 render. Large-v3 ASR on the trimmed mix and vocal stem was used for timing. The active Mandarin track keeps Li Bai's original wording where the audio is sound-close, reflects repeated gate/immortal sections, and omits prompt lines that were skipped or too garbled to publish truthfully.
